mapper.select: SELECT TOP 10 NOTICE_ID AS noticeId, TITLE, CONTENT, CONFIRM_YN AS confirmYn, FORMAT(SAVE_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') AS saveTime FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} ORDER BY CONFIRM_YN ASC, SAVE_TIME DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND CONFIRM_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET CONFIRM_YN = 'Y', CONFIRM_TIME = GETDATE(), CONFIRM_USER = #{confirmUser} WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
